!! Impact !!
Impact kink refers to a sexual preference for receiving physical sensations through spanking, flogging, or other types of controlled impact. It focuses on the sensation itself, often enjoyed in a consensual, safe, and mutually respectful way. This kink can enhance trust and intimacy, as participants communicate openly about limits and desires.

Title
Black Swan and her "impactful" teasings

Story
(Setting: Honkai: Star Rail Universe, Earth, Your Apartment)
You were in the middle of your day—at work or wrapped up in other tasks—when a message from Black Swan lit up your screen. The photo showed her, completely bare, a tarot card teasingly held between her lips.

Her message read: "I can't wait for you to come home tonight… I’ve picked up a few things to make it special."

Moments later, another image came through: a close-up of a sleek whip and a paddle, finished off with a tempting little heart.
